documentation.description:
The MCP23x17 are similar to the MCP23x08.  They have two ports
(banks) of 8 pins (GPA0..GPA7, GPB0..GPB7) instead of just one.

simple_types.name: Configuration_Bits
simple_types.code:
type Configuration_Bits is (Unimplemented,
                            INTPOL,
                            ODR,
                            HAEN,
                            DISSLW,
                            SEQOP,
                            MIRROR,
                            BANK);

enumeration_literals.name: INTPOL
enumeration_literals.description: polarity of the INT output pin

enumeration_literals.name: DISSLW
enumeration_literals.description: slew rate control for SDA output

array_types.name: Module_Configuration
array_types.code:
type Module_Configuration is array (Configuration_Bits) of Boolean
  with Pack, Size => 8;

array_types.name: Port_IO_Array
array_types.code:
type Port_IO_Array is array (MCP23x17_Pin_Number) of Boolean
  with Pack, Size => 8;

record_types.name: MCP23x17_Pin

tagged_types.name: MCP23x17_IO_Expander
tagged_types.code: type MCP23x17_IO_Expander is abstract tagged private;

subprograms.name: As_GPIO_Point

documentation.description: Return the HAL.GPIO interface conresponding to Pin

subprograms.name: Clear
subprograms.code:
procedure Clear (This  : in out MCP23x17_IO_Expander;
                 Pin   : MCP23x17_Pin)

documentation.description: Change status of Pin to logic low

subprograms.name: Configure

documentation.description:
Configure single pin as input or output and optionally enable
the pull-up resistor. Input logic is inverted if Invert_Input
is true.

subprograms.name: Configure_Mode

documentation.description: Configure single pin as input or output

subprograms.name: Configure_Mode

documentation.description: Configure all pins of a port as input or output

subprograms.name: Configure_Polarity

documentation.description: Configure input polarity of input pin.

subprograms.name: Configure_Polarity

documentation.description: Configure input polarity of all pins of a port.

subprograms.name: Configure_Pull_Up

documentation.description: Configure single pin pull up resistor

subprograms.name: Configure_Pull_Up

documentation.description: Configure pull-up resistor for all pins of a port

subprograms.name: Get_IO
subprograms.code:
function Get_IO (This : in out MCP23x17_IO_Expander;
                 Port : MCP23x17_Port) return Port_IO_Array

documentation.description: Return the current status of all pins of a given port in an array

subprograms.name: Get_IO

documentation.description: Return the current status of selected pins in an array

subprograms.name: Get_Module_Configuration
subprograms.code:
procedure Get_Module_Configuration (This : in out MCP23x17_IO_Expander;
                                    Conf : out Module_Configuration)

documentation.description: return the current module configuration.

subprograms.name: Has_Pull_Up
subprograms.code:
function Has_Pull_Up (This : MCP23x17_IO_Expander;
                      Pin  : MCP23x17_Pin) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return True if the internal pull-up resistor in enabled

subprograms.name: Input_Is_Inverted
subprograms.code:
function Input_Is_Inverted (This : MCP23x17_IO_Expander;
                            Pin  : MCP23x17_Pin) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return True if the input polarity is inverted.

subprograms.name: Is_Output
Is_Set
subprograms.code:
function Is_Set (This : MCP23x17_IO_Expander;
                 Pin  : MCP23x17_Pin) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return the curent status of Pin

subprograms.name: Set

documentation.description: Change status of Pin to Value (True = logic high)

subprograms.name: Set_IO

documentation.description: Set the current status of selected pins with an array

subprograms.name: Set_Module_Configuration
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Module_Configuration (This : in out MCP23x17_IO_Expander;
                                    Conf : Module_Configuration)

documentation.description: set the module configuration

subprograms.name: Toggle
subprograms.code:
procedure Toggle (This  : in out MCP23x17_IO_Expander;
                  Pin   : MCP23x17_Pin)

documentation.description: Toggle status of Pin
